failedAssertions.reason: After adding `qa-helper` under the isolated `~/.agents/skills/` fixture and clicking refresh, the Central Skills list stayed at 3 entries and SQLite never recorded the new skill.
Claude Code and Codex CLI platform views still render the empty state even though the sidebar badges and isolated SQLite database both show installed skills.
Submitting a single-platform install shows `batch_install_to_agents missing required key skillId`, so no symlink is created.
Submitting a multi-platform install shows the same missing `skillId` command error, so batch install never completes.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by `VAL-PLAT-001`: populated platform views still render no skill cards, so mixed symlink/copy source indicators never appear.
Blocked by `VAL-PLAT-001`: no rendered platform cards were available to show source indicators.
Blocked by `VAL-PLAT-001`: the populated platform views exposed only the empty state, leaving no visible list for search to filter.
Blocked by `VAL-PLAT-001`: no platform skill card rendered, so there was nothing clickable to navigate into the detail route.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated user-testing guidance to use the current 24200-24210 port range and to serialize native macOS Tauri reruns that share one app window and AX state.
